findings.title: Asset detail 500s when Tactical local_ips is a string (count() TypeError) — both VAN-DC01 and VAN-APP01 [high/P1]
Client sub-tab pages throw JS TypeError (activity-tab listener on null) [medium/P2]
Invoice list never shows 'Overdue' — past-due Posted invoices look identical to current ones [medium/P2]
Asset 'Alerts & Tickets' tab hides resolved tickets by default, shows (0) / 'No tickets found' [medium/P2]
